description: Asia Broadcasting Corporation (Pvt) Ltd., Vs M.J.K. Dissanayake, before Hon. Dr. Sumudu Premachandra J.
parties: Asia Broadcasting Corporation (Pvt) Ltd., Vs M.J.K. Dissanayake,
keywords: Can a broadcaster be treated as a "public authority" under Section 43(g) of the RTI Act- Media Ethics, Hiru TV Case
legistation: Article 14A of our Constitution, Sections 3,4, 5(g), 43(g) of the RTI Act, sections 7(2), 32 Sri Lanka Rupavahini Corporation Act No. 6 of 1982, Universal Declaration of Human Rights, through Article 19, Article 12 of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights
